voice_adherence.weakest_moment: "Không —" Lần nữa. Cùng một từ. Anh lặp lại như đoạn mã bị kẹt trong vòng lặp. Không. Không. Không. Nhưng mỗi lần anh nói, từ ấy nhẹ đi một chút, mất đi chút sức nặng, cho đến khi nó chỉ còn là âm thanh — một chuỗi âm vị không mang ý nghĩa.
voice_adherence.fix: The voice profile demands sentences that are 'cụt lủn, bỏ lửng, một từ đơn đứng độc lập giữa hai dấu chấm' for pain/fragmentation. This passage explains the metaphor instead of embodying it. Cut the explanation. Let the repetition do the work: 'Không. Không. Không. Từ ấy nhẹ đi. Mất sức nặng. Âm thanh.'
voice_adherence.note: The chapter mostly nails the cold, surgical tone. The vocabulary wells (ping, render, độ trễ) are used effectively. Body-before-emotion works well in the physical descriptions of Cường's reactions. But several passages over-explain metaphors that should be left sharp and bare, which softens the phẫu thuật edge the voice demands.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: The outline specifies: 'Cường đổ bộ lần cuối, đối mặt với Kẻ Đuổi trong Căn gác xép.' The chapter delivers this, but the confrontation feels more like a confession scene than a confrontation. Cường barely pushes back.
beat_coverage.fix: Give Cường more resistance before he breaks. Let him argue, deny, try to assert control — and have Kẻ Đuổi systematically dismantle each defense. The outline says 'đối mặt để đòi lại quyền kiểm soát' — he should TRY to control before failing.
beat_coverage.note: All four beats are present: the confrontation, the name reveal (Lan), the memory flood showing what he did, and the devastating truth. However, Beat 1 is half-hit because Cường capitulates too easily. The 'No, and' structure requires him to actively fight for control before losing it.

character_voice.weakest_moment: "Anh nên làm gì?" Anh hỏi. Giọng anh nhỏ. Nhỏ đến mức anh tự hỏi cô có nghe thấy không.
character_voice.fix: Cường's voice profile says 90% statements, rarely asks questions. This question is dramatically necessary, but the narration around it softens his character. Make the question land harder by keeping his observational voice: 'Anh nên làm gì. Không phải câu hỏi. Là lỗi hệ thống. Anh không có lệnh xử lý cho trường hợp này.'
character_voice.note: Kẻ Đuổi/Lan's voice is the chapter's triumph. The shift from the glass-bell voice to the tired, cracked voice is beautifully executed. Her dialogue carries real weight. Cường's voice is less distinctive — several passages could belong to any protagonist. But his best moments ('Biến đi.' / 'Không —') hit the terse, surgical register perfectly.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The revelation that the gác xép is Lan's memory, not Cường's, is stated rather than discovered. 'Cường nhận ra: đây không phải căn gác xép của anh. Nó chưa bao giờ là của anh.'
plants_seeded.fix: Let Cường work harder for this realization. Have him notice specific details that don't fit his memories — the angle of the ceiling is wrong, the wood grain doesn't match any building he knows, the window faces a direction that makes no sense in his architecture. Let the reader piece it together before he does.
plants_seeded.note: The gác xép resolution from Ch 12 is handled well. The connection to Bà Lành's observations and Bác sĩ Tuấn's data is organic. The mảnh giấy from the previous chapter pays off. The weakest plant is actually the strongest one — the reveal is too clean, too directly stated.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Nhưng mỗi lần anh nói, từ ấy nhẹ đi một chút, mất đi chút sức nặng, cho đến khi nó chỉ còn là âm thanh — một chuỗi âm vị không mang ý nghĩa.
prose_quality.fix: Cut to: 'Từ ấy nhẹ đi. Mất sức nặng. Âm thanh. Không còn nghĩa.' The original explains what the reader already feels. Trust the repetition.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Sự thật không chiếm diện tích, nhưng nó chiếm oxy. Nó làm nghẹt thở.
prose_quality.note: The prose is strongest when it's most physical and specific. The memory sequences — quán cà phê with bàn nhựa xanh, ghế nhựa trắng, tàn nhang ở sống mũi — are vivid and precise. The weakest passages are those where the narrator explains emotional states rather than rendering them. Several paragraphs follow the same structure (statement → elaboration → metaphor), creating rhythmic monotony in the middle section.

continuity.note: Excellent continuity from the previous chapter. The mảnh giấy, the name Lan, the resolve to go to St. Vincent — all carry forward naturally. The vết xước continues its heartbeat motif. The emotional state tracks: Cường ended Ch 15 with determination to find answers, and Ch 16 delivers those answers devastatingly. One minor issue: the previous chapter established Cường had vết bầm (bruise) on xương sườn, but this chapter refers to vết xước (scratch) on ngực. The physical marker seems to have shifted.

violations: MAJOR: The chapter reveals Cường personally modified Lan's neural parameters (khóa vùng nhận thức bản thân 90%, mở vùng phản ứng tình dục 100%). Canon states Cường is a kế toán, không phải kỹ sư — his competence is 7 specifically because he doesn't understand system architecture deeply. Writing custom neural override code is beyond his established skillset.

MAJOR: The chapter implies Cường had access to the Hemera system interface and patient data before becoming an unauthorized user. Canon says he stole the Neural Mantle in 2039 from police evidence storage. The timeline of when he could have modified Lan's consciousness is unclear.

MINOR: The chapter refers to 'vết xước' (scratch) on ngực. Canon establishes a 'vết bầm hình bán nguyệt' (bruise) on xương sườn trái. These may be different marks, but the text treats them as the same phenomenon.
MINOR: Kẻ Đuổi says 'Em sợ tối... Em đã nói với anh rồi.' but no prior scene shows this conversation. If this happened off-screen, it should be clearer.
MINOR: The chapter uses 'vết xước' and 'vết thương' interchangeably for the mark on Cường's chest, but the original canon specifies a bruise (vết bầm).
canon_compliance.note: The most significant canon issue is Cường's technical capability. The outline says he 'bóp méo ý thức của Lan để biến cô thành búp bê tình dục,' which requires the modification to have happened — but the HOW must be reconciled with his established competence level. Perhaps he used pre-existing override protocols he found, or Bảo helped him, or the system had templates he exploited. The current presentation makes him seem like a skilled hacker, which contradicts his character sheet.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The memory of Cường at the Hemera interface, typing override commands, feels like the one moment where lore is being explained rather than lived.
lore_integration.fix: Instead of showing the interface with labeled fields ('Vùng vận động: KHÓA'), show Cường's hands shaking as he selects options from a menu he barely understands — checkboxes, dropdowns, a UI designed for doctors that he's fumbling through with desperation. This maintains lore while staying true to his competence level.
lore_integration.note: The chapter does excellent work with the world's rules. Ping as emotional barometer, render quality as consciousness indicator, the gác xép as self-rendered memory — all serve the story rather than decorating it. The connection between Bà Lành's observations and Lan's trapped consciousness is particularly well-integrated.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section of the memory flood, specifically: 'Bác sĩ nói gì đó. Cường không nghe. Tai anh ù đặc. Chỉ nghe tiếng máy tim bíp. Bíp. Bíp. Bịp.' This is the most generic hospital-scene prose in the chapter.
engagement.fix: Make this moment specific to Cường's character. He's a kế toán — he wouldn't just hear beeps, he'd count them, track intervals, calculate: 'Bíp. Bíp. Bịp. Khoảng cách 0.83 giây. Nhịp tim bảy mươi hai. Bình thường. Bình thường. Máy nói cô bình thường nhưng cô không mở mắt.'
engagement.note: The chapter's strongest engagement comes from the reversal: Cường as monster, not victim. The moment when Lan says 'Anh không muốn cứu em. Anh muốn giữ em' is genuinely surprising and devastating. The ending — Cường walking to St. Vincent to face what he did — creates strong forward momentum. The weakest engagement is in the memory sequences, which occasionally fall into familiar beats.

three_weakest_sentences: Nhưng mỗi lần anh nói, từ ấy nhẹ đi một chút, mất đi chút sức nặng, cho đến khi nó chỉ còn là âm thanh — một chuỗi âm vị không mang ý nghĩa.
Cơn đau ở somewhere else. Ở nơi mà ping không đo được. Ở vùng mà não bộ không có thụ thể, mà ý thức không có đơn vị đo.
Và giọng anh — giọng của Cường trước khi quên — không phải giọng của người đang buồn. Giọng của người đang sở hữu.
three_strongest_sentences: Sự thật không chiếm diện tích, nhưng nó chiếm oxy. Nó làm nghẹt thở.
Anh khóa vùng nhận thức bản thân. Chín mươi phần trăm. Em không biết em là ai. Em chỉ biết phản ứng. Em chỉ biết chạm. Em chỉ biết làm những gì anh muốn.
Mỗi lần anh chạm em trong thế giới ảo, tín hiệu truyền ngược lại. Kích thích sai vùng. Làm hỏng thêm vùng đang hồi phục. Hai mươi phần trăm cơ hội trở thành mười. Rồi năm. Rồi một. Rồi không.
ai_patterns_detected: Symmetrical structure addiction: Several emotional beats are delivered in balanced pairs or triplets (e.g., 'Không phải hệ thống. Không phải Hemera. Không phải công nghệ. Anh.')
Paragraph template repetition: Many paragraphs follow statement → elaboration → metaphor/resolution structure, especially in the middle section.

Over-explanation of metaphors: The prose sometimes explains what a metaphor means rather than letting it resonate (e.g., 'một chuỗi âm vị không mang ý nghĩa' explaining the repetition that already speaks for itself).
Emotional telling: Several passages assert emotional states directly ('Anh biết cô đúng') rather than showing through physical detail.
Uniform sentence rhythm in dialogue sections: Lan's longer speeches maintain similar cadence throughout, missing opportunities for the 'nhiễu' (glitch) patterns described in her voice profile.
top_3_revisions: RECONCILE CƯỜNG'S TECHNICAL CAPABILITY: The scene where he writes custom neural override code must be rewritten to match his competence level (kế toán, not kỹ sư). Options: (a) He found pre-existing 'therapy templates' and misapplied them deliberately, (b) Bảo helped him modify the parameters, (c) He used a crude interface with checkboxes/sliders designed for medical staff, selecting options without fully understanding consequences. The current version makes him a skilled hacker, which breaks his character.

STRENGTHEN CƯỜNG'S RESISTANCE IN THE CONFRONTATION: Per the outline's 'No, and' structure, Cường should actively fight to maintain control before the memories break him. Add 2-3 exchanges where he tries to assert authority ('Anh nói biến đi. Biến.' / attempts to access system commands / tries to force-render Phố Hoa Sữa back into existence) — and fails. His capitulation will hit harder if his struggle is visible.

FIX THE VẾT BẦM/VẾT XƯỚC INCONSISTENCY: Canon establishes a vết bầm (bruise, hình bán nguyệt) on xương sườn trái. This chapter uses vết xước (scratch) on ngực. Either reconcile these as the same mark that has evolved, or establish them as separate phenomena. The heartbeat motif (năm mươi ba) is powerful and should be preserved, but the physical description must match canon.
new_canon_entries: Cường's 851st deployment (lần đổ bộ thứ 851) — up from 847 in the previous chapter, indicating 4 deployments between chapters.
Lan is the real identity of Kẻ Đuổi — a woman Cường knew in Hà Nội before her accident.
Lan's room at St. Vincent is Room 4 (Phòng 4), matching the mảnh giấy from Ch 15.
Cường personally modified Lan's neural parameters: locked 90% of self-awareness, opened 100% of tactile and sexual response.
Lan had a 20% chance of recovery before Cường's interventions; each deployment further damaged recovering neural pathways.
The gác xép is Lan's memory of her attic room in Hà Nội, self-rendered from her 10% remaining consciousness.
Lan's real appearance: mặt tròn, má hơi đầy, tàn nhang ở sống mũi, tóc buộc cao, răng khểnh.
Cường and Lan's relationship: at least two months of dating in Hà Nội before her accident.
Lan's family signed consent forms for Neural Mantle therapy.
Kẻ Đuổi's voice has changed from glass-bell clarity to something deeper, tired, cracked — reflecting her awakening consciousness.
Cường has decided to permanently stop deploying and to visit Lan's real body at St. Vincent.
